boarding.subject: {{studentName}} has boarded the bus
boarding.body:
Dear {{parentName}},

Your child {{studentName}} has boarded bus {{busNumber}} on route {{routeName}} at {{time}}.

Expected arrival: {{eta}}

School Bus Transport Management System

alighting.subject: {{studentName}} has left the bus
alighting.body:
Dear {{parentName}},

Your child {{studentName}} has alighted from bus {{busNumber}} on route {{routeName}} at {{time}} at stop {{stopName}}.

School Bus Transport Management System

emergency.subject: URGENT: Emergency Alert - Bus {{busNumber}}
emergency.sms: URGENT: Emergency on bus {{busNumber}} with {{studentName}}. School notified. Call {{contactPhone}}

delay.subject: Bus {{busNumber}} Delayed
delay.body:
Dear {{parentName}},

Bus {{busNumber}} on route {{routeName}} is experiencing a delay.

Reason: {{reason}}
Expected delay: {{delayMinutes}} minutes
New ETA: {{newEta}}

We apologize for any inconvenience.

School Bus Transport Management System
delay.sms: Bus {{busNumber}} delayed {{delayMinutes}} min. Reason: {{reason}}. New ETA: {{newEta}}

routeChange.subject: Route Change Notice - {{routeName}}
routeChange.sms: Route {{routeName}} change for {{studentName}} from {{effectiveDate}}. New times: pickup {{newPickupTime}}, dropoff {{newDropoffTime}}

absence.subject: Absence Confirmation - {{studentName}}
absence.sms: Absence confirmed for {{studentName}} on {{date}}. No bus service.

reminder.subject: Reminder: {{studentName}} Bus Service
